user_stories.title: Generate Learning Path
user_stories.i_want_to: get a curated list of episodes based on my role and goals
user_stories.so_that: I can have a structured learning experience.
acceptance_criteria: User inputs Role (e.g., PM, Founder) and Goal (e.g., 'Scaling to 10M users').
System queries the Knowledge Graph for 'Best Practices' and 'Experts' related to the goal.
System creates an ordered playlist of episodes, prioritizing maximum information gain.
UI displays progress tracking through the curriculum.
